CO2_PreT.Unit Description: Multistage compression and intercooling system to bring CO2 from ambient conditions to mineralization pressure (140 bar).
CO2_PreT.Connectors Description: Interface points for raw CO2 feed, pressurized CO2 delivery to the reactor, and electrical power supply.

FLOW VALUE.formula: =Captured_Multistage compression and intercooling system to bring CO2 from ambient conditions to mineralization pressure (140 bar).
=Captured_Multistage compression and intercooling system to bring CO2 from ambient conditions to mineralization pressure (140 bar).

CO2_PreT.Heat Streams Description: Thermal energy removed from the CO2 gas between compression stages to improve efficiency and manage outlet temperatures.

CO2_PreT.Equipments Description: Physical hardware including a multistage compressor train and intercooling heat exchangers (Stages 1-4).
CO2_PreT.Operating Cost Description: The fixed and variable operating costs includes manpower, fixed cost of operation, taxes etc.

Grinding.Unit Description: Mechanical size reduction and magnetic separation unit to prepare raw serpentine ore for thermal activation.
Grinding.Connectors Description: Stream interfaces for raw mineral feed, ground product, magnetic byproducts, and the electrical power required for milling.
Grinding.Equipments Description: Capital assets including a high-energy ball mill for particle size reduction and a magnetic separator for iron removal.
Grinding.Operating Cost Description: The fixed and variable operating costs includes manpower, fixed cost of operation, taxes etc.

Serp_PreT.Unit Description: Thermal activation unit (calciner) used to dehydroxylate serpentine at high temperatures (600°C) to maximize chemical reactivity.
Serp_PreT.Connectors Description: Interfaces for ground mineral feed, activated mineral discharge, and the electrical power for kiln operation and material handling.
Serp_PreT.Heat Streams Description: There are two cold streams to preheat and activate the serpentine and one hot stream for the cooling of the activated serpentine,
Serp_PreT.Equipments Description: High-temperature processing assets including a rotary kiln for activation and a solid-solid heat recovery system.
Serp_PreT.Operating Cost Description: The fixed and variable operating costs includes manpower, fixed cost of operation, taxes etc.
